vulnerability.reference: Policy distillation amplifies VLM reward biases, causing brittle generalization across manipulation tasks.
vulnerability.generated: Goal-conditioned policy relies solely on VLM reward, lacking ground-truth verification to detect calibration drift.

impact.reference: Robots fail to generalize learned skills to new objects or environments, increasing task completion time and error rates.
impact.generated: Cross-task generalization collapses, producing unreliable manipulation behaviors and task execution failures.

dose_response.reference: Miscalibrated VLM reward signals misguide policy learning, which in multi-task RL with rendered image scoring leads to brittle generalization and failure to adapt to new objects or environments.
dose_response.generated: Miscalibrated VLM reward signals, through VLM-supervised multi-task robot manipulation learning, trigger reliance on biased rewards without ground-truth verification, leading to cross-task generalization collapse, producing unreliable manipulation behaviors and task execution failures.
